title: botrychium multifidum var. intermedium
intro: Botrychium multifidum var. intermedium, also known as the intermediate fern or rattlesnake fern, is a rare and unique variety of the fern family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Botrychium multifidum var. intermedium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
